relative_path: Management & planning/Background, framework and strategic goals/Metacluster analysis inspo.md
full_text:
1. Tumor Composition analysis

 a. Which % of each tumor metacluster does every patient have?

 b. Are there patient subgroups sharing similar compositions? Which
 > are their clinical parameters?

 c. Is there any associations of the tumor metaclusters with the
 > mean area of the cells?

 i. Slow cycling vs fast cycling cells size

2. Does the relative abundance of these metaclusters affect the
 > organization of the sample's immune landscape and other emergent
 > properties of the phenotypic community -\> Aleksandra's
 > pipeline(?)

 a. We can try to identify the immune cell types that are changing
 > among the defined patient subgroups based on their tumor cell
 > cycle landscape

3. Tumor metacluster location

 a. Aggregation patterns

 b. Distances to the TSI

 c. Distances to the immunes

4. Checking DDR

 a. Where are the DDR markers expressed mainly in?

 i. Labels from metaclusters

 ii. Markers to find associations: Cell cycle, proliferation,
 > DDR, size
